title: $300 bags, $150 earrings, $60 hats: Mid-priced products are a status symbol for young shoppers
summary_full: A growing number of Gen Zers and millennial consumers with disposable income are shifting away from both luxury- and discount-priced retail items alike.
summary_public: A growing number of Gen Zers and millennial consumers with disposable income are shifting away from both luxury- and discount-priced retail items alike.
